'''jarada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaar|zaar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaar|zaar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jarada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jærædæth|jærædæth]] || [[word:jærædæj|jærædæj]] || [[word:jærædæsh|jærædæsh]] || [[word:jærædæ|jærædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jararadath|jararadath]] || [[word:jararadaj|jararadaj]] || [[word:jararadash|jararadash]] || [[word:jararada|jararada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaradath|jaradath]] || [[word:jaradaj|jaradaj]] || [[word:jaradash|jaradash]] || [[word:jarada|jarada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jarafdath|jarafdath]] || [[word:jarafdaj|jarafdaj]] || [[word:jarafdash|jarafdash]] || [[word:jarafdaf|jarafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaradatha|jaradatha]] || [[word:jaradaja|jaradaja]] || [[word:jaradasha|jaradasha]] || [[word:jaradaka|jaradaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaradath|jaradath]] || [[word:jaradaj|jaradaj]] || [[word:jaradash|jaradash]] || [[word:jarada|jarada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaradathal|jaradathal]] || [[word:jaradajal|jaradajal]] || [[word:jaradashal|jaradashal]] || [[word:jaradakal|jaradakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaradathatha|jaradathatha]] || [[word:jaradajaja|jaradajaja]] || [[word:jaradashasha|jaradashasha]] || [[word:jaradaka|jaradaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaradathan|jaradathan]] || [[word:jaradajan|jaradajan]] || [[word:jaradashan|jaradashan]] || [[word:jaradakan|jaradakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaradathaoro|jaradathaoro]] || [[word:jaradajaoro|jaradajaoro]] || [[word:jaradashaoro|jaradashaoro]] || [[word:jaradakaoro|jaradakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
